  'headline': 'How The Arvinas (ARVN) Story Is Evolving As 2026 Neurology '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',

 {'date': '2026-03-06 10:09:28',
  'headline': 'How The Arvinas (ARVN) Narrative Is Evolving With New '
              'Leadership And Key 2026 Pipeline Catalysts',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Arvinas’ updated fair value price target has shifted from '
             'US$12.81 to US$14.56, a move of about US$1.75 per share that '
             'puts a fresh spotlight on the name for many investors. That '
             'change aligns with a wave of analyst commentary, with higher '
             'price targets in the US$18 to US$20 range being linked to '
             'pipeline updates, new leadership, and a tighter focus on '
             'upcoming ARV 102 and ARV 393 milestones. Read on to see how '
             'these developments are shaping the evolving Arvinas story and '
             'what to watch...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/arvinas-arvn-narrative-evolving-leadership-100928051.html'},

 {'date': '2026-02-24 19:00:24',
  'headline': 'Arvinas (ARVN) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript',
  'publisher': 'Motley Fool',
  'summary': 'It is an honor and a privilege to lead such a talented and '
             'committed team as Arvinas enters a period where we anticipate '
             'multiple value-driving milestones at the company.  With four '
             'ongoing clinical trials across oncology and neurology, including '
             'our recently begun first-in-human trial of our polyQ AR '
             'degrader, ARV-027, we believe we have the potential to bring '
             'truly differentiated treatments to millions of underserved '
             'patients.',
  'url': 'https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2026/02/24/arvinas-arvn-q4-2025-earnings-call-transcript/'},
